description: A field technician has dumped raw waveform data from a recent deployment into ~/Downloads/raw_dump/. The files have generic names, but their internal miniSEED headers are intact. Organize these files into a standard SeisComP Data Structure (SDS) archive at ~/Documents/ShadowArchive using the scart (SeisComP Archive Tool). The final output must be a valid SDS directory tree starting at ~/Documents/ShadowArchive.
